title: Better Vanilla Combat
description: Version 1.20 | The Most Optimized PVP Modpack | PVP has never been better than this!
body:
![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1188450351775494175?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=4a94fb&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)

## FEATURES

⚒️ QoL Features such as Totem Counter, Apple Skin, and Health Indicators (Optional)

🔧 Optimized for low latency and smooth gameplay

🌈 Optimization + Shader Support

🗳️ Smooth Motion Blur (Optional)

💯 100+ Mods

## DESCRIPTION

**Better Vanilla Combat** is a modpack for players who want to optimize and improve their Vanilla PVP experience. This modpack comes with every mod needed for an enjoyable PVP experience while accommodated by high framerate! 

Our modpack stays true to the vanilla experience allowing you to play on all popular PVP servers such as PVPLegacy, MCCIsland, MCPVP, and much more!

## REQUIREMENTS

Better Vanilla Combat is very optimized and light weight, 2-4GB of RAM recommended for best gameplay experience. 4GB+ will grant extra performance. This should be able to run on most low-end machines.
